3232250.name: MoveFort
3232250.description:
Movefort is a survival tower defense roguelike game. In this world where monsters grow stronger over time, you need to build various towers on a moving platform, collect coins to enhance yourself and your towers, and strive to survive.

Game Features:

1. Each tower can be upgraded independently.
2. You can bring coins into each game, so you don’t have to start from scratch.
3. You can pause at any time to adjust the tower .
4. Break records in INFINITE Mode and find the best tower combinations.
5. Upgrade platform levels and slots to increase the number of towers.
3232250.supported_languages:
英语*, 简体中文*, 繁体中文*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
